imports.description: Standard Angular Material imports for a typical CRUD component

input.text:
<mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
  <mat-label>Label</mat-label>
  <input matInput [(ngModel)]="model.field" name="field" required>
  <mat-error>Field is required</mat-error>
</mat-form-field>
input.select:
<mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="full-width">
  <mat-label>Label</mat-label>
  <mat-select [(ngModel)]="model.field" name="field" required>
    <mat-option *ngFor="let opt of options" [value]="opt.value">{{ opt.label }}</mat-option>
  </mat-select>
</mat-form-field>

table.description: mat-table with sort, filter and paginator – replaces Bootstrap table
table.html:
Filter search
Column 1 {{ row.col1 }} Actions
No data found.

card.form:
<mat-card>
  <mat-card-header>
    <mat-card-title>{{ selectedItem?.id ? 'Edit' : 'New' }} Entity</mat-card-title>
  </mat-card-header>
  <mat-card-content>
    <form #form="ngForm" (ngSubmit)="save()">
      <!-- mat-form-field inputs here -->
    </form>
  </mat-card-content>
  <mat-card-actions>
    <button mat-raised-button color="primary" (click)="save()" [disabled]="form.invalid">Save</button>
    <button mat-stroked-button (click)="reset()">Cancel</button>
  </mat-card-actions>
</mat-card>

navbar.description: mat-toolbar top bar + optional mat-sidenav for navigation
navbar.html: home Home APP_TITLE

listView.description: Full list-view layout: filter + table + paginator + form card side-by-side
listView.layout: Two-column layout: left col (~65%) = table, right col (~35%) = form card (hidden when nothing selected)
listView.html: ENTITY_PLURAL

promptHints.description: Rules the AI MUST follow when generating Angular Material components
rules: ALWAYS use Angular Material components. NEVER use bare HTML elements (<table>, <input>, <button>, <select>).
Use mat-table with MatTableDataSource, MatPaginator, MatSort for all lists.
Use mat-form-field with appearance='outline' for all form inputs.
Use mat-raised-button color='primary' for primary actions, mat-stroked-button for secondary.
Use mat-icon-button with matTooltip for inline table actions (edit/delete).
Use mat-card as content container for forms and detail views.
Use mat-toolbar color='primary' for the navigation bar.
Spacing: use CSS variables --spacing-1 (8px) through --spacing-6 (48px) or the utility classes (mt-2, mb-3, p-3, gap-2, etc.) from styles.scss.
Use mat-snack-bar for success/error feedback instead of alert().
Import only the specific MatXxxModule needed – do NOT import MatLegacyXxxModule.
All components must be standalone: true.
Use MatTableDataSource for reactive filtering and pagination.
Apply class='full-width' on mat-form-field inside cards (ensure 100% width).
Use mat-icon names from Material Icons: https://fonts.google.com/icons
For delete confirmation: use confirm() browser dialog or mat-dialog – no custom modal HTML.
NEVER import Angular Material from @angular/material/legacy-* paths.
